{{C|Uppercut||2}} is a 2 {{Icon|IE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon&color:Ironclad|Uncommon|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack&color:Ironclad|Attack|2}} Card for the {{KW|Ironclad||2}}.
== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
*{{BD|Vulnerable||2}} applied by this card:
** Increases damage dealt by {{C|Bully||2}}.
** Grants an additional hit from {{C|Dismantle||2}}.
** Grants additional {{BD|Strength||2}} from {{C|Dominate||2}}.
** Draws 1 (2) card via {{C|Vicious||2}}.
** Makes enemies deal 50% less damage with {{C|Colossus||2}}.
** Makes enemies take 25% (50%) more damage with {{C|Cruelty||2}}.
** Makes enemies take 25% more damage with {{R|Paper Phrog||2}}.
====Relics====
* {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} can potentially double {{C|Uppercut||2}}'s {{BD|Weak||2}} ''and'' {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{R|Intimidating Helmet||2}} grants 4 {{KW|Block||2}} whenever this card is played.
===Neutral===
*When attacking an enemy with 1 {{BD|Artifact||2}}, {{C|Uppercut||2}}'s {{BD|Weak||2}} will be negated, and its {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} will be applied after.
